steps.title: Simple 4-Step Process
steps.step2_desc: Select the visa that fits your needs

step1.title: Global Eligibility
step1.subtitle: 97+ Countries
step1.content: Check your visa-free or E-VOA eligibility instantly. Our database covers 97 countries with direct real-time updates from Indonesian Immigration.

step2.title: Secure Data Handling
step2.subtitle: AES-256 Encryption
step2.content: Your privacy is our priority. We use bank-level AES-256 encryption to protect your data. All sensitive documents are permanently deleted 48 hours after visa issuance.

step3.title: AI Pre-Verification
step3.subtitle: Zero Error Policy
step3.content: Our AI screening system checks your passport and documents for errors before submission, ensuring a 99% approval rate.

step4.title: Payment & ID Activation
step4.subtitle: Instant Confirmation
step4.content: Complete payment via secure gateways. Upon payment, you receive an email confirmation and your IDIV Tracker ID is immediately activated.

apply_extend.apply_desc: Start your new visa application. Fast, secure, and fully online.
apply_extend.extend_desc: Extend your stay in Indonesia easily. We handle the documentation for you.

services_preview.title: Our Services
services_preview.description: We offer comprehensive Indonesian visa solutions tailored to your needs, whether you're a tourist, business professional, or looking for long-term residency.
services_preview.visit_desc: Short-term stay options including Visa Exemptions and Visa on Arrival (VOA).
services_preview.single_desc: Longer stays (60-180 days) for tourism, business, pre-investment, or social visits.
services_preview.multiple_desc: 1, 2, or 5-year validities for business or tourism. Enter and exit freely.
services_preview.kitas_desc: Work, Investor, Family, and Retirement residency permits (1-5 years).

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.description: Our streamlined process makes getting your Indonesian visa effortless. With over 16 years of experience, we've helped thousands of travelers and businesses secure their visas with a 98% approval rate.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Complete our simple online form with your travel details. Our smart form guides you through each step, ensuring you provide all necessary information correctly.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Our expert team reviews and submits your application. We handle all communication with immigration authorities and keep you updated every step of the way.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Receive your approved visa via email. Print or save digitally - you're ready to explore Indonesia! We also provide post-approval support if needed.

step1.title: Application Intake
step1.content: Our smart form validates your data in real-time, catching potential errors before you even finish typing.

step2.title: Expert Audit
step2.content: Every application is reviewed by a triple-certified immigration specialist to ensure 100% compliance with current laws.

step3.title: Digital Delivery
step3.content: Your visa is delivered in high-resolution PDF format, linked to your IDIV Smart Card for instant verification.

funnel_status.title: Live Application Funnel
funnel_status.subtitle: How we process thousands of successful visas every month

stages.title: Pre-Screening
stages.desc: Every document is manually checked by our experts within 30 minutes of submission.

stages.title: Verification
stages.desc: Identity and document authenticity verification with Indonesian Immigration database.

stages.title: Immigration Process
stages.desc: Direct submission to the official system. We monitor status updates every 4 hours.

stages.title: Visa Issued
stages.desc: Digital visa delivery directly to your email and dashboard. Ready to fly!

stage1.title: Intelligent Pre-Screening
stage1.content: Our AI screening engine scans for over 40 common rejection triggers, from passport glare to blurry signatures.

stage2.title: Database Synchronization
stage2.content: We sync your data with the official Indonesian immigration system, creating a pre-verified draft before final submission.

stage3.title: Real-Time Submission
stage3.content: Your application is pushed to the priority processing queue, bypasses traditional manual batch processing.

stage4.title: IDIV Activation
stage4.content: Once issued, your Digital Visa Identity (IDIV) is generated, enabling instant QR verification for airlines and hotels.

why_choose_us.title: Why Choose Us?
why_choose_us.description: We're your trusted partner with proven expertise. Since 2010, we've been Indonesia's leading visa service provider, trusted by individuals and corporations worldwide.
why_choose_us.feature4_desc: Always available via WhatsApp, email, or phone in multiple languages

feature1.title: Express Processing Lane
feature1.content: We offer 1-4 hour turnaround times for eligible VOA and E-VOA applications. Our direct API integration bypasses traditional queues.

feature2.title: Bank-Level Protection
feature2.content: Your data is protected by the same security standards used by global financial institutions (AES-256).

feature3.title: The Draft System™
feature3.content: We maintain an industry-leading success rate by pre-verifying every application as a 'draft' in the official system first.

feature4.title: Multi-Lingual Experts
feature4.content: Access our dedicated support team via WhatsApp 24/7. Our agents are legally trained to handle complex visa scenarios.

faqs.q: How long does visa processing take?
faqs.a: Standard processing: 3-5 business days. Express service: 1-4 hours (additional fees apply). VOA can be obtained on arrival at Indonesian airports for eligible nationalities.

Valid passport (minimum 6 months validity), recent passport photo, proof of accommodation in Indonesia, return/onward flight ticket. Business visas may require additional documents like invitation letters.
Yes! We offer visa extension services for most visa types. VOA can be extended once for 30 days. Tourist visas (B211A) can be extended up to 4 times. Apply at least 7 days before your visa expires.

Fees vary by visa type. VOA: $20 USD. Tourist Visa: from $40 USD. Business visas: from $50-150 USD depending on type. KITAS: from $500-1500 USD. All prices include government fees and our service charges.

faqs.q: Which countries are eligible for Indonesian visas?
faqs.a: Citizens from 97 countries are eligible for VOA and visa services. This includes most European, American, Asian, and Oceanic countries. Some countries require special treatment or additional documentation.

questions.a1: Standard processing: 3-5 business days. Express service: 1-4 hours (additional fees apply). VOA can be obtained on arrival at Indonesian airports for eligible nationalities.
questions.a2: Valid passport (minimum 6 months validity), recent passport photo, proof of accommodation in Indonesia, return/onward flight ticket. Business visas may require additional documents like invitation letters.
questions.a3: Yes! We offer visa extension services for most visa types. VOA can be extended once for 30 days. Tourist visas (B211A) can be extended up to 4 times. Apply at least 7 days before your visa expires.
questions.a4: Fees vary by visa type. VOA: $20 USD. Tourist Visa: from $40 USD. Business visas: from $50-150 USD depending on type. KITAS: from $500-1500 USD. All prices include government fees and our service charges.

privacy_policy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy_page.intro_p1: Indonesian Visas, operating under PT Indonesian Visas Agency™ (referred to as 'we', 'us', or 'our'), is steadfast in its commitment to protecting your privacy and handling your data transparently. This comprehensive Privacy Policy governs your use of our platform (www.indonesianvisas.com), associated satellite domains, and outlines our practices regarding the collection, safeguarding, processing, and disclosure of personal data when you utilize our visa and immigration facilitation services.
privacy_policy_page.data_collect_p1: To facilitate official immigration procedures in compliance with the Directorate General of Immigration of the Republic of Indonesia, we collect the following categories of personal and sensitive data:
data_collect_list: Identity Credentials: Full legal name, date of birth, nationality, gender, and biometric passport data (e.g., Passport Number, Issue/Expiry Dates, Issuing Authority).
Contact Information: Primary email address, active WhatsApp/phone number, residential address, and emergency contact details.

Financial Data: Secure payment confirmations, billing addresses, and transaction histories (Note: Credit card numbers are processed by certified third-party gateways and are not stored on our servers).
Immigration History: Details of past Indonesian visas, overstays, deportations, or criminal records if required for specific visa categories (e.g., KITAS or Business Visas).
Supporting Documentation: Digital copies of passports, bank statements, flight itineraries, vaccination records, and sponsor letters.
privacy_policy_page.data_use_p1: We strictly limit the use of your personal data to the following operational and legal necessities:
data_use_list: Application Processing: Verifying eligibility and formally submitting your visa application to the Indonesian Immigration authorities via the official eVisa system.
Communication: Sending critical updates regarding your application status, approval notifications, or requests for additional documentation.
Legal Compliance: Adhering to anti-money laundering (AML), counter-terrorism financing (CTF) regulations, and internal record-keeping SOPs dictated by Indonesian corporate law.
Service Improvement: Aggregating anonymized analytical data to optimize our platform's user experience and regional service offerings.
privacy_policy_page.data_protection_p1: We deploy enterprise-grade security architecture, including end-to-end encryption (TLS 1.3), secure socket layers, and strict access control protocols (RBAC) to prevent unauthorized access, data breaches, or accidental loss. Your personal data is stored on secure, geographically redundant servers. Data is retained only for the duration necessary to satisfy the purposes outlined herein, or as legally mandated by the Indonesian government (typically a minimum of 5 years for financial and immigration records).
privacy_policy_page.rights_p1: Subject to applicable Indonesian and international data protection laws (including GDPR parity principles where applicable), you possess the right to: (A) Request access to your personal data; (B) Request rectification of inaccurate data (provided the visa has not yet been submitted); (C) Request erasure of your data post-service completion (subject to mandatory legal retention periods); and (D) Withdraw consent for marketing communications at any time.
privacy_policy_page.contact_p1: For any privacy-related inquiries, data subject requests, or to report a security vulnerability, please contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO) at:
privacy_policy_page.contact_address:
PT Indonesian Visas Agency™
Jl. Tibung Sari No.11C, Padangsambian Kaja,
Denpasar Barat, Denpasar, Bali 80117, Republic of Indonesia
Email: privacy@indonesianvisas.com
Secondary Email: compliance@bali.Enterprises
privacy_policy_page.ack_text: Acknowledgment: By utilizing our platform and submitting your application, you explicitly consent to the collection, processing, and cross-border transfer of your personal data as stipulated in this Privacy Policy, our Terms & Conditions, and our Refund Policy.

terms_conditions_page.title: Terms & Conditions
terms_conditions_page.company_info_p1: Indonesian Visas is a premier immigration facilitation agency legally registered and operating under PT Indonesian Visas Agency™, a subsidiary of PT Bali Enterprises Indonesia. We function as a licensed administrative proxy between the applicant and the Directorate General of Immigration of the Republic of Indonesia. By utilizing www.indonesianvisas.com or any affiliated services, you agree to be bound by these comprehensive Terms & Conditions.
terms_conditions_page.scope_p1: Our mandate includes the advisory, preparation, submission, and tracking of Indonesian visas (e.g., e-VOA, B211A, Multiple-Entry, KITAS/KITAP) and related corporate services. We operate strictly as an administrative facilitator. We are not an official government entity, and we do not possess the authority to issue visas, alter immigration laws, or guarantee entry into the Republic of Indonesia.
terms_conditions_page.approval_p1: The issuance of any visa or stay permit is at the absolute and sole discretion of the Indonesian Immigration authorities. PT Indonesian Visas Agency™ cannot guarantee application approval, processing timelines, or the final validity period granted. Immigration retains the right to request additional documentation, mandate interviews, or reject applications without providing justification. Our service fees are for the administrative processing and are entirely independent of the government's final decision.
terms_conditions_page.obligations_p1: The Client warrants that all information, declarations, and documents provided are authentic, accurate, and current. The Client acknowledges that submitting forged documents, providing false declarations, or concealing criminal history constitutes a severe violation of Indonesian law, which may result in immediate application rejection, blacklisting, or legal prosecution. The agency bears zero responsibility for consequences arising from Client misrepresentation.
terms_conditions_page.payments_p1: All service fees, government levies, and associated taxes must be paid in full prior to the commencement of the application process. Prices are subject to change based on government regulatory updates or currency fluctuations. Overstay penalties, deportation costs, or subsequent legal fees incurred by the Client while in Indonesia are exclusively the Client's financial responsibility.
terms_conditions_page.liability_p1: In no event shall PT Indonesian Visas Agency™, its directors, or employees be held liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from visa rejections, delays, flight cancellations, deportation, or entry denial at the border. Furthermore, we are exempt from fulfilling obligations in cases of Force Majeure, including but not limited to global pandemics, natural disasters, sudden government regulatory changes, system outages at the Immigration department, or political unrest.
terms_conditions_page.dispute_p1: These Terms & Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Indonesia. Any disputes arising out of or in connection with these terms shall first be attempted to be resolved through amicable negotiation. If unresolved, the dispute shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the District Court of Denpasar, Bali.
terms_conditions_page.ack_italic: By engaging our services, remitting payment, or submitting documents, the Client irrevocably accepts these Terms & Conditions in their entirety.

refund_policy_page.title: Refund & Cancellation Policy
refund_policy_page.denial_p1: While our agency maintains a 99% success rate, the final decision rests with the Indonesian Government. If an application is officially rejected by Immigration on grounds not related to client misrepresentation (e.g., forged documents, red notices, undisclosed criminal history), PT Indonesian Visas Agency™ may, at its sole discretion, issue a partial refund. This refund will exclude the non-refundable Mandatory Government Visa Fee and a 10% administrative processing fee. Rejections due to client fraud or negligence are strictly non-refundable.
refund_policy_page.force_majeure_p1: If the Indonesian Government unexpectedly changes immigration policies, closes borders, or suspends visa issuance protocols after an application has been paid for but before it is approved, we will hold the application in credit for future use. Refunds requested under Force Majeure conditions (e.g., pandemics, system outages) are subject to a 20% administrative deduction to cover incurred operational costs.
refund_policy_page.approved_p1: Once an e-VISA, KITAS, or relevant permit has been officially issued and approved by Indonesian Immigration, the service is deemed 100% complete and fulfilled. Approved visas are strictly non-refundable and non-transferable under any circumstances, regardless of whether the applicant decides to utilize the visa, alter their travel dates, or cancel their trip to Indonesia.
refund_policy_page.submission_p1: CRITICAL: Once our legal team has officially submitted your application into the Indonesian Immigration portal, the application enters an irreversible state. At this stage, government fees are paid and irrevocable. Therefore, if a client requests withdrawal, cancellation, or modification after submission but before approval, absolutely NO REFUND can be issued.
refund_policy_page.cancellation_p1: Clients may request a cancellation of their application only if our team has not yet begun processing the documents or submitted them to Immigration. In such pre-processing scenarios, a cancellation is eligible for a 70% refund of the total invoice value. The remaining 30% acts as a penalty for reserved operational bandwidth and initial consultation.
refund_policy_page.method_p1: All approved refunds will automatically be credited back to the original method of payment (e.g., the specific Credit Card or Bank Account used during checkout). Due to international banking clearing cycles and our internal auditing processes, please allow between 14 to 21 business days from the date of refund approval for the funds to reflect in your account. Cash refunds or cryptocurrency refunds are strictly prohibited.
refund_policy_page.exclusions_p1: No refunds will be granted for: (A) Typos or errors submitted by the client that result in an invalid visa; (B) Flight delays causing the client to miss their visa validity window; (C) Deportation or denial of entry at the airport by Immigration officers; (D) Change of mind after the document processing has commenced.

verification_explained_page.title: QR Verification System
verification_explained_page.description: Explanation of the digital verification process for authorities, partners, and immigration officers.
verification_explained_page.how_works_p1: The Indonesian Visas Verification System provides an instant, tamper-proof method to validate the authenticity of documents issued or facilitated by our agency.
verification_explained_page.step1_desc: Scan the QR code printed on the document using any smartphone camera.
verification_explained_page.step2_desc: You will be redirected to a secure URL starting with indonesianvisas.com/verify/.
verification_explained_page.step3_desc: Compare the digital data on screen with the physical document.
verification_explained_page.status_valid_desc: The document is authentic, active, and recognized by our internal database. The holder is in good standing.
verification_explained_page.status_invalid_desc: The document has been cancelled, expired, or was never issued. Do not accept this document.
verification_explained_page.data_visibility_p1: To protect privacy, the public verification page displays only the essential information required to confirm identity and document validity:
data_list: Full Name (Partial masking may apply in some contexts)
verification_explained_page.privacy_note: Note: Sensitive personal contact details and payment history are NOT accessible via the QR code.
verification_explained_page.disclaimer_text: Indonesian Visas provides administrative assistance and facilitation services. Final immigration approval, entry denial, and stay permits remain the sole authority of the Directorate General of Immigration of Indonesia. The verification system confirms the authenticity of our agency's issuance process, not the government's final decision.
verification_explained_page.safety_guard_desc: Our verification system is audited and hardened against fraud, providing a multi-layered shield for every traveler under our sponsorship.
verification_explained_page.advanced_system_desc: The IndonesianVisas.com verification engine is built on modern microservices architecture, ensuring high availability and instant response times.
